title: Locales should be set for data types
description: Locales should be set for data typesAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmelllocalisationWhy is this an issue?When you create aDataTableorDataSet, you should set the locale explicitly. By default, the locale for these types is the current culture. For data that is stored in a database or file and is shared globally, the locale should ordinarily be set to the invariant culture (CultureInfo.InvariantCulture).This rule raises an issue whenSystem.Data.DataTableorSystem.Data.DataSetinstances are created without explicitly setting the locale property (DataTable.LocaleorDataSet.Locale).Noncompliant code exampleusing System; using System.Data; namespace MyLibrary { public class Foo { public DataTable CreateTable() { DataTable table = new DataTable("Customers"); // Noncompl
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
// Noncompliant: Locale not set for DataSet
var dataSet = new DataSet(); // Noncompliant

logic.triggering_conditions: DataTable or DataSet instantiation without Locale property assignment
exclusion_conditions: Locale property set via object initializer ({ Locale = ... })
never_trigger_on: DataTable/DataSet instances where Locale is explicitly set
logic.reasoning: Detects DataTable and DataSet instantiations without explicit Locale property setting. The custom function finds all new DataTable() and new DataSet() patterns, identifies the variable name, and checks if Locale is assigned within a reasonable scope (next 500 chars). Supports both explicit assignment (var.Locale = ...) and inline object initializers ({ Locale = ... }).

should_trigger: DataTable table = new DataTable("Customers"); // No locale
var dataSet = new DataSet(); // No locale
DataTable users = new DataTable("Users"); // No locale
should_not_trigger: DataTable table = new DataTable("Customers"); table.Locale = CultureInfo.InvariantCulture;
var dataSet = new DataSet(); dataSet.Locale = CultureInfo.InvariantCulture;
DataTable users = new DataTable("Users") { Locale = CultureInfo.InvariantCulture };
